name: RSA-2048/SHA-256
notes: Current RPKI baseline; SPKI size is an approximate DER value. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: ML-DSA-65
notes: Primary balanced PQC candidate. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: ML-DSA-87
notes: High-assurance candidate with larger objects. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: SLH-DSA-SHAKE-128s
notes: Hash-based diversity candidate; signature size is the main concern. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: SLH-DSA-SHAKE-192s
notes: Conservative diversity candidate with very large signatures. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: P-256/SHA-256
notes: Compact classical counterfactual; not the current RFC 6488 RPKI profile. Signature size uses the conservative DER maximum. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: Ed25519
notes: Compact classical counterfactual; not the current RFC 6488 RPKI profile. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: ML-DSA-44
notes: Measured comparison excluded from the primary profile by the Category 3 policy floor. Timed operations each include one OpenSSL process launch.

name: Falcon-512
notes: Best size/performance candidate in the 2025 RPKI study; no final RPKI-ready X.509/CMS path. In-process timings are not directly comparable with OpenSSL CLI timings.
specification: NIST-selected Falcon; FN-DSA final profile pending

name: Falcon-1024
notes: Category-5 Falcon comparison. In-process timings are not directly comparable with OpenSSL CLI timings.
specification: NIST-selected Falcon; FN-DSA final profile pending

name: MAYO-1
notes: Multivariate candidate with compact signatures; not standardized. In-process timings are not directly comparable with OpenSSL CLI timings.

name: SNOVA-(24,5,4)
notes: Multivariate candidate with very compact signatures; not standardized. In-process timings are not directly comparable with OpenSSL CLI timings.

name: HAWK-512
notes: Promising lattice candidate retained as metadata-only because liboqs 0.15.0 and OpenSSL 3.6.2 do not provide it.
reason: candidate is not enabled by oqs-python/liboqs

name: RSA-2048+ML-DSA-44
notes: Component-size sum excluding composite ASN.1 overhead; no local X.509/CMS interoperability evidence.
reason: No local composite signature implementation or interoperability profile
